notices.registrationDisabled: New registrations are currently disabled. Please contact your administrator.

ssoErrors.identityInUse: That sign-in identity is already linked to a different account. Contact your administrator.
ssoErrors.inviteRequired: Your sign-in succeeded, but no account here is linked to that identity yet. Ask your administrator for an invite, then try again.
ssoErrors.noPartnerAccess: That account does not have access to this workspace. Contact your administrator.
ssoErrors.ssoLinkRequired: This account already has a password. Sign in with your password, then connect SSO under Profile → Security.

account.description: You'll be the first admin for this company

recoveryCodes.description: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once.
recoveryCodes.importantDescription: Store these codes in a secure location. You will not be able to see them again.

checkEmail.description: If registration can proceed, we've sent a confirmation link to that address. Click it to finish creating your account.

account.currentPasswordHint: Changing your email requires your current password below.

account.partialPasswordWarning: Both current and new password are required to change your password.

errors.downloadTimedOut: Download timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

addressChanged.body: This link was sent to your previous address, so it can no longer be used. Sign in and request a new verification email for your current address.

consumed.body: Your email is already verified, or the link was used on another device.
consumed.title: This link has already been used

expired.body: Verification links expire after 24 hours. Sign in and request a new one from your account settings.
expired.title: This link has expired

invalid.body: The verification link is not recognized. Sign in and request a new one from your account settings.
invalid.title: This link is invalid

network.body: Check your connection and try the link again.
network.title: We couldn’t reach Breeze

superseded.body: Please use the most recent verification email — the older link is no longer valid.
superseded.title: A newer verification link was sent

unknown.body: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
unknown.title: Verification failed

noToken.description: This link is missing its token. Open the verification email and click the button again.
